prompt_text:
### Demographics: 44-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 5 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Reports 1-2 mild hypoglycemia episodes per month (self-resolved); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
Heart failure: HFrEF (NYHA Class II)
ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction
MASH
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF: HFrEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction; MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Current smoker (20 cigarettes/day for 20 years; ~20 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/week

### Medication information
- Current medications: Dulaglutide 1.5mg once weekly; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 85.6 kg; Height 164.8 cm; BMI 31.5 kg/m²; Blood pressure 136/80 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.5%; 9 months ago 8.2%; 6 months ago 7.7%; 3 months ago 7.2%; current 5.9%), FPG (12 months ago 231mg/dL; 9 months ago 208mg/dL; 6 months ago 175mg/dL; 3 months ago 190mg/dL; current 110mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 86.2kg; 9 months ago 84.7kg; 6 months ago 83.8kg; 3 months ago 80.7kg; current 85.6kg), Height (12 months ago 164.8cm; 9 months ago 164.8cm; 6 months ago 164.8cm; 3 months ago 164.8cm; current 164.8cm), BMI (12 months ago 32.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 31.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 31.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 30.0kg/m²; current 31.5kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 138mmHg; 9 months ago 137mmHg; 6 months ago 140mmHg; 3 months ago 140mmHg; current 136mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 81mmHg; 9 months ago 80mmHg; 6 months ago 82mmHg; 3 months ago 79mmHg; current 80mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 60U/L; 9 months ago 50U/L; 6 months ago 48U/L; 3 months ago 52U/L; current 56U/L), AST (12 months ago 84U/L; 9 months ago 81U/L; 6 months ago 76U/L; 3 months ago 67U/L; current 81U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.8mg/dL; current 0.8mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 28mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 23mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 23mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 25mL/min/1.73m²; current 23mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 325mg/g; 9 months ago 232mg/g; 6 months ago 291mg/g; 3 months ago 275mg/g; current 255mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 80mg/dL; 9 months ago 74mg/dL; 6 months ago 74mg/dL; 3 months ago 74mg/dL; current 76mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 42mg/dL; 9 months ago 42mg/dL; 6 months ago 44mg/dL; 3 months ago 41mg/dL; current 43mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 120mg/dL; 9 months ago 122mg/dL; 6 months ago 123mg/dL; 3 months ago 142mg/dL; current 131mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.0g/dL; 9 months ago 10.2g/dL; 6 months ago 10.9g/dL; 3 months ago 11.0g/dL; current 10.3g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
